description: Create the world controller layer: WorldManager (central world navigation controller) and AreaEncounterGenerator (generates enemy compositions for each area). Wire WorldManager into CombatEngine to support area-based combat alongside the existing wave system. Update SaveData and SaveManager to persist WorldState.
steps: Create src/controller/WorldManager.java - Central controller that: (1) initializes all AreaData with encounter definitions per the spec (Goblin Warrens: 5 encounters + boss, Bone Cathedral: 5 + boss, Plague Gardens: 5 + boss, Lich's Throne: 3 + final boss, Danjin's Core: 2-3 patrols), (2) manages WorldState, (3) provides methods: getAvailableAreas(), enterArea(Area), getNextEncounter(), retreatToHub(), isAreaComplete(Area), applyAreaMechanic() for toxic atmosphere/consecrated ground/void instability, (4) generates area-specific events with choices matching the spec.

Create src/controller/AreaEncounterGenerator.java - Generates Enemy[] arrays for each encounter. Follows exact spec: Goblin Warrens encounters 1-5 + GoblinKing boss; Bone Cathedral encounters 1-5 + BoneColossus boss; Plague Gardens encounters 1-5 + Thornmother boss; Lich's Throne 3 elite + Lich final boss. Uses PlagueElemental and Thornmother from FEAT-001.

Add world-aware methods to CombatEngine.java: (1) Add a WorldManager field, (2) Add startStoryMode(String playerName, CharacterClass) that initializes WorldManager and sets state to WORLD_MAP, (3) Add startEncounter(Area, int encounterIndex) that uses AreaEncounterGenerator to create enemies and transitions to AWAITING_PLAYER_ACTION, (4) Modify handleAllEnemiesDefeated/handleEnemyDefeated to check if in story mode and transition to AREA_NAVIGATION instead of WAVE_TRANSITION when story mode is active, (5) Add processAreaMechanic() for per-turn area effects (toxic atmosphere 3 dmg, etc.), (6) Keep existing wave-based flow intact for Classic Mode.

Update src/model/SaveData.java: Add fields for world state persistence - currentArea (String), completedAreas (List<String>), keysCollected (List<String>), encounterProgress (String format 'AREA:index' list), restShrineUsed (boolean), eventChoices (List<String> format 'eventName:choiceIndex'), gameMode (String: 'CLASSIC' or 'STORY'). Update toJson() and fromJson() methods.

Update src/controller/SaveManager.java: Update createSaveData() to extract WorldState into SaveData fields when in story mode. Update CombatEngineRestorer to restore WorldManager state from SaveData when gameMode is 'STORY'.
Run ./gradlew classes to verify everything compiles
acceptance_criteria: WorldManager can initialize all 4 area definitions with correct encounter counts
AreaEncounterGenerator produces correct enemy compositions matching the spec
CombatEngine supports both story mode (world-based) and classic mode (wave-based) without breaking existing flow
SaveData can serialize and deserialize world state fields
SaveManager correctly persists and restores world state
verification: Run ./gradlew classes and confirm BUILD SUCCESSFUL
